text.title: value-stream-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for value-stream-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent hallucinates ID links across tools using loose regex matching.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require explicit referenced-by chains in source systems; reject inferred links that lack audit trail.

failure-mode.description: Timezone bugs in lead-time calculation — agent uses local time, losing UTC anchor.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force UTC; never local. Reconcile agent output against a known-good calculation.

failure-mode.description: DORA "elite" is published as a scorecard without trend context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: DORA levels are meaningless without trend. Publish as "up from X% last quarter" not "we are elite".

failure-mode.description: Webhook-driven instrumentation drops events under load.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reconcile with periodic full pulls; webhooks are real-time hints, not the authoritative feed.

failure-mode.description: AI commits flood the repo with micro-PRs that distort throughput.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tag bot PRs and report human/bot split; do not mix them into DORA.

failure-mode.description: "Reliability" (5th DORA metric) is org-defined; agent picks the SLO target.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Humans define reliability SLO; agents implement measurement only.

failure-mode.description: Constraint identification flips month-to-month with low data volume.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require ≥ 50 items per type before declaring a bottleneck; flag insufficient data explicitly.
